title: loxogramme paltonioides
intro: Loxogramme paltonioides, also known as the Chinese scale fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the division Pteridophyta and is native to parts of Asia, particularly in China and India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat a variety of health conditions, such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Loxogramme paltonioides include decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat various health issues, and the plant is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
